name: pi-boy
description: Game Boy / Game Boy Color emulator extension for pi

scripts.build:native: cd extensions/gameboy/native/gb-core && npm install && npm run build && cd ../kitty-shm && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:native:audio: cd extensions/gameboy/native/gb-core && npm install && npm run build:audio && cd ../kitty-shm && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:native:debug: cd extensions/gameboy/native/gb-core && npm install && npm run build:debug && cd ../kitty-shm && npm install && npm run build:debug
